title: BrawlCraft
description: A mod made for BrawlStars and Minecraft lovers...
body:
📢 Notes
Read all the description carefully to fully and properly understand and play the mod !
This mod is still evolving — if you find bugs, glitches, or server incompatibilities (most probably wont, but still if) , please report them immediately so they can be immediately fixed.
Your feedback will help me to fix all the problems and provide a seamless experience.

🧨 BrawlCraft

BrawlCraft brings a unique Brawl Stars twist into Minecraft! Unlock powerful brawlers, complete custom quests, and unleash crazy abilities — all balanced to fit naturally into survival gameplay.

🎯 How It Works

Each Brawler is locked behind a unique quest. Complete it to unlock their ability or special item. Use /brawler commands to manage unlocks and /brawleritem to recover lost items.

🕹️ Brawlers & Abilities
🧨 Dynamike

Quest: Kill 20 mobs with a single TNT.

Ability: Gain a custom Dynamite item that can be thrown — it spawns TNT on landing!

⚡ Max

Quest: Run 5,000 blocks.

Ability: On drinking a potion, gain a huge speed boost and move freely. After a few seconds, return to the starting point and recover all lost health. (Just like his gadget !!)

🐝 Bea

Quest: Interact with 10 naturally spawned bee nests.

Ability: 33% chance to summon an Angry Bee when hit. The bee slows, weakens, and poisons the attacker.

⛏️ Jacky

Quest: Break 10 iron pickaxes.

Ability: Receive a Jacky Drill item that breaks blocks in a 3×3 area (but skips unbreakables like obsidian).

🏹 Bo

Quest: Kill 20 enemies with a fully charged bow.

Ability: 50% chance to fire 3 arrows at once.

💀 Doug

Quest: Pop 10 totems of undying.

Ability: Totems will trigger from your inventory even if not held — but the revival comes with a twist…

☠️ Crow

Quest: Kill 20 zombies under the same poison effect.

Ability: 33% chance to poison targets with any projectile.

🔧 Commands

/brawler unlock <brawler> [player] → Unlock a brawler.

/brawler lock <brawler> [player] → Lock a brawler.

/brawler clear [player] → Lock all brawlers.

/brawleritem claim <Dynamike|Jacky> [player] [count] → Restore lost custom items.

💡 Press F3 + O in-game to open the Brawler Switcher.

Contact: MrMisc29 on YouTube, Discord, or via the mod comment section.

✨ Become a Minecraft brawler, prove yourself in quests, and dominate the battlefield with BrawlCraft!
